# Case full-hash-main: Step 1

## Changed Files
- thing.js

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Bundle: thing_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 39
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 175
- Update: thing_js.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 408

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main","thing_js"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules


#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```



### thing_js.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./thing.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules


#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("thing_js", {
"./thing.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (2);


},

});
```
